name: Altria Group, Inc.
description: Altria Group, Inc. is a leading American corporation and one of the world's largest producers and marketers of tobacco, cigarettes, and related products. Headquartered in Richmond, Virginia, the company maintains a portfolio of iconic brands that have been market leaders in the U.S. tobacco industry for decades. Altria is currently focused on its 'Moving Beyond Smoking' strategy, which emphasizes the development and marketing of smoke-free product platforms and harm-reduction alternatives for adult tobacco consumers, while maintaining a commitment to corporate responsibility and long-term shareholder value.
